meaning: National Union of Railwaymen(英国)全国铁路职工工会
examples: Nur is typical of many of the unskilled rural workers who make their way abroad.
There is a lot of disaffection with Nur Adde among the old MP-warlord interests.
But then, amid the turmoil, Nur finds solace writing poetry: odes to his homeland and his lost love.
Nur, the injured girl, was a Year 11 student at the school until July.
Another bloc containing the al-Nur party was predicted to take some 20% of the vote.
